title: Story Morals
entries: Ally Quandry (choose the best ally - hurting the other)
Friend Quandry (A friend makes an impossible demand)
Honor Quandry (Victory, but at a cost to one's own honor)
Rescue Quandry (villain, or NPCs in distress?)
Respect Quandry (Whose advice and expertise do you respect more?)
Sacrifice Quandry (Sacrifice something meaningful for a greater cause)
Truth Quandry (Choose between revealing a painful truth or perpetuating a comforting lie)
Power Quandry (Acquire a great power, but it comes with significant consequences)
Forgiveness Quandry (Decide whether to forgive someone who has caused immense harm)
Legacy Quandry (Choose between personal aspirations and the legacy one leaves behind)
Mercy Quandry (Show mercy to a foe who may not deserve it)
Love Quandry (A choice between love and duty)
Knowledge Quandry (Decide whether to pursue forbidden knowledge for the greater good)
Isolation Quandry (Choose between personal happiness and isolation for the safety of others)
Leadership Quandry (Make a decision that challenges your leadership and authority)
Desperation Quandry (Act out of desperation, potentially causing unintended harm)
Redemption Quandry (Give a chance for redemption to someone with a dark past)
Trust Quandry (Decide whether to trust someone with a dubious background)
Family Quandry (Choose between family loyalty and what is morally right)
Identity Quandry (A choice that questions one's own identity and values)
Prejudice Quandry (Confront and challenge one's own prejudices and biases)
Expediency Quandry (Choose a quick and easy solution with potential negative consequences)
Consequence Quandry (Decide between two options, each with significant and opposite outcomes)
Empathy Quandry (Choose to prioritize empathy and compassion over logic and reason)
Betrayal Quandry (Decide how to deal with a betrayal from someone you trusted)
Justice Quandry (Choose between personal revenge and pursuing justice for all)
Selflessness Quandry (Act selflessly for the greater good, risking personal well-being)
Nature Quandry (Decide between the needs of civilization and the preservation of nature)
Faith Quandry (A choice that challenges one's beliefs and tests faith)
Mercenary Quandry (Choose between personal gain and fulfilling a greater moral duty)
Duty Quandry (Decide between following your duty and what you believe is right)
Temptation Quandry (Face a temptation that could lead to personal gain but moral compromise)
Betrayed Quandry (Choose whether to betray a former ally who betrayed you first)
Redistribution Quandry (Decide between helping the less fortunate or preserving personal wealth)
Revenge Quandry (Choose between seeking revenge and pursuing peace)
Cowardice Quandry (Face a dangerous situation where courage is needed, but fear holds you back)
Vengeance Quandry (Decide between vengeance for past wrongs or forgiveness and moving forward)
Nature vs. Nurture Quandry (Decide whether a villain's evil deeds are a result of their upbringing or inherent nature)
Artificial Intelligence Quandry (Decide whether to treat an advanced AI as a living being or a tool to be controlled)
Euthanasia Quandry (Decide whether to end the suffering of a terminally ill character or let nature take its course)
Sacrificial Quandry (Decide whether to sacrifice oneself to save others or let others take the risk)
Dilemma of Immortality (Decide between accepting immortality at a great cost or accepting mortality)
Oathbreaker Quandry (Choose between breaking a sacred oath to save lives or upholding the oath at all costs)
Betrayal of Innocence (Decide between protecting a child or innocent being from harm, even if it means betraying your allies)
Pursuit of Justice (Decide between adhering to the law or pursuing justice outside of legal boundaries)
Tolerance Quandry (Decide whether to tolerate the actions and beliefs of others, even if they go against your own values)
Immortality Quandry (Choose between gaining immortality and watching loved ones age and die)
Time Travel Quandry (Decide whether to alter the past to change the present or let history unfold)
Mirror Quandry (Confront an evil version of oneself and prove moral superiority)
Fate Quandry (Choose between accepting a predestined fate or forging one's own path)
Elder Quandry (Decide between respecting an elder's wishes and following one's own aspirations)
Compliance Quandry (Obey an unjust authority for the sake of safety or rebel and face consequences)
Framed Quandry (Decide how to handle being wrongfully accused and seek justice or vengeance)
Restraint Quandry (Choose between seeking revenge for a personal loss or finding inner peace)
Doppelgänger Quandry (Encounter an exact copy of oneself and determine who deserves to exist)
Foresight Quandry (Know a future catastrophe but risk disbelief and isolation in trying to prevent it)
Bound Quandry (Choose between sacrificing autonomy to save others or preserving freedom)
Oathbound Quandry (Break a life-altering oath or duty for the greater good or personal happiness)
Ruler's Dilemma (Make a difficult ruling that serves justice but sacrifices compassion)
Pacifist Quandry (Decide between resorting to violence for a just cause or maintaining pacifism)
Prophecy Quandry (Learn a prophecy that could bring about doom or salvation and decide what to do)
Revolution Quandry (Choose between supporting a revolution for change or upholding the current order)
Guardian Quandry (Decide between protecting an important artifact or using its power for good)
Oblivion Quandry (Decide whether to erase the memories of a traumatic event or confront the truth)
Silent Witness Quandry (Witness a crime but risk personal safety or anonymity to report it)
Stranger Quandry (Help a stranger in need or remain uninvolved in their troubles)
Patron Quandry (Choose between serving a powerful patron or maintaining independence)
Petrification Quandry (Decide whether to cure someone who's turned to stone at the cost of another life)
Boundaries Quandry (Face uncomfortable truths that challenge personal boundaries and beliefs)
Fading Hope Quandry (Choose between rekindling hope in a desolate community or seeking a new home)
Unholy Alliance Quandry (Form an alliance with unlikely allies for a greater cause)
Eclipse Quandry (Make a decision that determines the outcome of a rare celestial event)
Unveiled Deception Quandry (Discover a lifelong deception that alters one's identity and choices)
Haunted Quandry (Choose between moving on from a haunting past or seeking revenge)
The Chosen Quandry (Decide whether to accept a prophesized role or forge a different destiny)
Artificial Emotion Quandry (Encounter an AI or construct displaying emotions and consider its significance)
Symbiosis Quandry (Choose between preserving a fragile ecosystem or advancing civilization)
Echoes of the Past (Confront unresolved issues from the past that resurface unexpectedly)
Trial of Wisdom (Face a trial that tests intellectual prowess rather than physical strength)
Whims of Fate (Suffer random misfortunes and decide whether to accept them or challenge fate)
Siren's Call Quandry (Resist the enchanting call of a mystical being or succumb to its allure)
Eternal Night Quandry (Choose between breaking a curse of eternal darkness or embracing it for power)
Fleeting Happiness Quandry (Experience moments of intense happiness that come with a ticking clock)
Last Song Quandry (Decide whether to protect or destroy a song that has mystical powers)
Virtue vs. Survival (Choose between upholding one's virtues and compromising to survive)
Orphan's Quandry (Confront one's origins and decide between embracing or rejecting them)
Sacrificial Quandry (Choose between sacrificing oneself or someone else for a noble cause)
Forgotten Vow Quandry (Encounter a person from the past who remembers a forgotten promise)
Trial of Compassion (Face a series of tests that challenge one's ability to show compassion)
False Accusation Quandry (Decide between seeking justice for a crime or protecting the real culprit)
Echo Chamber Quandry (Discover that one's beliefs have never been challenged and now face opposition)
Cursed Gift Quandry (Receive a powerful gift with a cursed consequence and must decide its use)
Spectral Reunion Quandry (Encounter a deceased loved one's spirit with an important message)
Perpetual Storm Quandry (Choose between calming a magical storm or harnessing its energy for power)
Doomsday Clock Quandry (Confront a ticking clock counting down to a catastrophic event)
The Weight of Leadership (Make a decision that affects the lives of many and bears heavy responsibility)
Unseen Threat Quandry (Sense an impending danger but struggle to convince others to take action)
Stolen Identity Quandry (Have one's identity stolen and must decide whether to clear or embrace the new persona)
Caretaker Quandry (Choose between upholding a vow to protect an object or use it to aid others)
The Hidden Temple (Discover a hidden temple with a guardian testing intruders' worthiness)
Tainted Gift Quandry (Receive a gift of great power that comes with a corrupting influence)
Abyssal Pardon (Encounter a repentant villain seeking redemption and must decide their fate)
Puzzle of Ages (Solve a mysterious puzzle that reveals a significant revelation)
Fading Humanity Quandry (Gradually lose humanity and struggle to hold onto benevolence)
The Cursed Compass (Use a magical compass that points to what the holder desires most)
Shattered Mirror Quandry (Face a shattered mirror reflecting distorted versions of the self)
The Eternal Guardian (Choose whether to free an ancient and powerful guardian or leave it captive)
Ward of Souls (Discover an object that traps tormented souls and must decide its fate)
The Unbreakable Oath (Swear an unbreakable oath with severe consequences for breaking it)
Veil of Deception Quandry (Uncover a web of lies that alters perceptions of friends and foes)
The Lost Oracle (Meet a reclusive oracle who knows the answers to life's deepest questions)
Insignificance Quandry (Confront a vast universe and consider one's place within it)
Wrath of the Elements (Choose between protecting a sacred land or exploiting its resources)
Fleeting Fame Quandry (Experience fleeting fame and must decide how to use newfound influence)
The Unseen Hand (Discover evidence of an influential but elusive puppet master)
The Final Sunrise (Witness a rare celestial event with life-altering consequences)
Crown of Tyranny Quandry (Possess the power to rule as a tyrant or serve as a benevolent leader)
Stolen Dreams Quandry (Enter dreams to confront deep desires and nightmares of oneself and others)
The Fractured Team (A team of heroes fractures due to clashing ideologies and loyalties)
The Nameless Tomb (Discover an ancient tomb with an enigmatic name and unknown treasures)
The Unfathomable Wish (Encounter a being capable of granting an unfathomable wish)
The Puppeteer's Strings (Realize that one's actions have been manipulated by an unknown force)
Echoes of Mercy (Encounter a fallen enemy in desperate need of help and mercy)
